name: Echo Game
description: I play a short phrase, you sing it back from memory. This trains your inner ear — the key to singing without a guide.

feedback.intro: Listen to the short phrase, then sing it back. The guide plays once, then it's your turn.
feedback.waiting: Your turn — sing what you heard...
feedback.complete: You echoed {noteCount} phrases. Avg {avg} cents off. {verdict}
feedback.tip: Your inner ear is a muscle. The more you echo, the better you'll hold pitch without needing a reference.
